category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Oman EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入阿曼：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入阿曼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China GB/T EV conductive charging documentation against Oman DGSM standards practice, IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 references, APSR and Nama grid-connection expectations, 50 Hz electrical assumptions, and Oman EV policy context.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国GB/T电动汽车传导充电文件与阿曼DGSM标准实践、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196参考、APSR和Nama并网要求、50Hz电气假设及阿曼电动汽车政策背景差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國GB/T電動汽車傳導充電文件與阿曼DGSM標準實務、IEC 61851 / IEC 62196參考、APSR和Nama併網要求、50Hz電氣假設及阿曼電動汽車政策背景差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DGSM scope determination, APSR licence or regulatory approval, Nama grid-connection approval, electrical-installation approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Oman standards, electrical safety, utility, grid, import, customs, metering, and local permit requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DGSM适用范围裁定、APSR许可或监管批准、Nama并网批准、电气安装批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行阿曼标准、电气安全、公用事业、电网、进口、海关、计量及地方许可要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DGSM適用範圍裁定、APSR許可或監管批准、Nama併網批准、電氣安裝批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿曼標準、電氣安全、公用事業、電網、進口、海關、計量及地方許可要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Oman, China GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 evidence is useful technical background but should not be treated as automatic Oman acceptance. The main gaps are DGSM scope confirmation, IEC 61851 safety mapping, IEC 62196 connector interoperability, Nama / distributor grid-connection review under APSR-regulated electricity-sector practice, 50 Hz configuration, and the fact that Oman EV policy signals do not by themselves create a single charger type-approval shortcut.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩出口阿曼时，GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234证据有技术参考价值，但不应视为自动取得阿曼认可。主要差距包括DGSM适用范围确认、IEC 61851安全映射、IEC 62196接口互操作、APSR监管电力行业实践下的Nama/配电商并网审查、50Hz配置，以及阿曼电动汽车政策本身并不形成单一充电桩型式批准捷径。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁出口阿曼時，GB/T 18487和GB/T 20234證據有技術參考價值，但不應視為自動取得阿曼認可。主要差距包括DGSM適用範圍確認、IEC 61851安全映射、IEC 62196接口互操作、APSR監管電力行業實務下的Nama/配電商併網審查、50Hz配置，以及阿曼電動汽車政策本身並不形成單一充電樁型式批准捷徑。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, tax authority, electrical-safety authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
